allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files'' -Filter ''*dotnet*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files'' -Filter ''*postgres*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'' -Filter ''*dotnet*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''D:\\'' -Filter ''*dotnet*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name; Get-ChildItem ''D:\\'' -Filter ''*postgres*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name")
